name: sde-interview-script-skill
description: Generate language-selectable senior SDE interview scripts as Excalidraw-style preview images plus editable links.

interface.longDescription: Turn technical interview excerpts into English-default or user-selected-language senior SDE speaking scripts embedded in handwritten Excalidraw-style boards, then reply with only the preview image and editable link by default.
defaultPrompt: Create a senior SDE Excalidraw preview image and link only. Default to English unless a language is specified.
Turn this excerpt into a 90-120 second interview answer in Chinese.
Draw an Excalidraw card with a blue decision flow.
